name: Clop Ransomware Execution Detected via Hash
description: Detects the execution of Clop ransomware binaries on a host by matching known cryptographic hashes of the malware.

prompts.prompt: Clop ransomware execution has been detected on the host {computer_name}. The process with the hash {hash} was executed by user {user} with command line arguments: '{command_line}'. This is a critical incident indicating that data encryption for impact is occurring or has already occurred. Immediate investigation and incident response are required. Review the parent process '{parent_image}' to understand the initial access vector.

parameters.name: computer_name
parameters.description: The hostname of the infected system.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user context under which the ransomware executed.

parameters.name: command_line
parameters.description: The full command line used to execute the process.

parameters.name: hash
parameters.description: The hash (e.g., SHA256) of the malicious executable.

parameters.name: parent_image
parameters.description: The full path to the parent process that launched the ransomware.
